role: VistA RPC developer tools — the `v rpc-debug` domain. Taps the RPC Broker's native debug log (XWBDEBUG) over the m engine seam to view/save live RPC traffic for offline comparison against the VSL tap. The safe, read-only sibling of the high-risk `v rpc-tap` domain; the two integrate only at the v-cli busybox.
